title: Write a Dockerfile
description: Produce a secure, small, well-layered Dockerfile.
content:
Write a production Dockerfile for a {{stack}} app.

Requirements:
- Multi-stage build to keep the final image small.
- Run as a non-root user.
- Pin base image versions; no `latest`.
- Order layers so dependency installs cache well.
- Include a healthcheck and sensible default command.
- No secrets baked into the image.

Explain the key choices in a few comments.
